rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes several inferential leaps (e.g., position-swap rate as proof of low ordering bias; stratified agreement as proof of generator-agnosticism). Verifying that these conclusions follow from the reported premises is a natural and load-bearing reading of 'check this' for scientific content.
rationale.R1.3: Numerical claims are central — 78.4% vs 61.2% vs 67.5%, alpha=0.61, 7.1% swap rate, 4-point verbosity lift — and each must be traceable to a described experimental setup. Confirming that reported figures actually support the stated conclusions is co-load-bearing with R1.2 under the most likely scientific-review interpretation.
